DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ILLINOIS UNION INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS - MOTION TO COMPEL ZF MICRO SOLUTIONS TO ANSWER SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, DENIED: THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT ZF MICRO SOLUTIONS WERE SERVED WITH SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. MOTION TO COMPEL ZF MICRO SOLUTIONS TO RESPOND TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; DAVID FELDMAN TO ANSWER SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; DAVID FELDMAN TO RESPOND TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, DENIED: MOOT SINCE PLAINTIFF HAS SERVED AND LODGED ANSWERS AND RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS. MOTION TO COMPEL ZF MICRO SOLUTIONS AND DAVID FELDMAN TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS, GRANTED. THE DOCUMENTS SHALL BE PRODUCED AT THE OFFICES OF BULLIVANT HOUSER BAILEY PC AT 10:00 A.M. ON THE TENTH DAY FOLLOWING FILING OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. IF THE TENTH DAY FALLS ON A HOLIDAY OR WEEKEND, THEN ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY. THE PARTIES ARE FREE TO ARRANGE FOR SOME OTHER DATE BY MUTUAL AGREEMENT. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $560 ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS ZF MICRO SOLUTIONS AND DAVID FELDMAN, JOINTLY, AND IN FAVOR OF ILLINOIS UNION INS. CO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID MAY; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Compliance With The Court'S Prior Order
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
William J. Rusteen, Esq. of Bullivant House Bailey PC, Tel. 415.352.2700, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Neither party contested the tentative ruling. Therefore, the Court adopts its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT ILLINOIS UNION INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Compliance With The Court's Prior Order: No opposition filed; motion granted. Plaintiffs shall fully comply with the Court order dated 12/20/13 no later than ten days after notice of entry of this order. Sanctions of $600 are awarded against Plaintiffs in addition to the $560 previously ordered. All sanctions shall be paid within ten days after notice of entry of this order. Any further violation of this Court's orders may result in imposition of issue preclusion or terminating sanctions. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM J. RUSTEEN OF BULLIVANT/BAILEY, TEL. NO. 352-2735 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ILLINOIS UNION INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents - Motion to compel ZF Micro Solutions to answer Special Interrogatories, Set One, Denied: there is no evidence that ZF Micro Solutions were served with Special Interrogatories.
Motion to compel ZF Micro Solutions to respond to Request for Production of Documents, Set One; David Feldman to answer Special Interrogatories, Set One; David Feldman to respond to Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Denied: moot since plaintiff has served and lodged answers and responses without objections.
Motion to compel ZF Micro Solutions and David Feldman to produce documents, Granted. The documents shall be produced at the offices of Bullivant Houser Bailey PC at 10:00 a.m. on the tenth day following filing of notice of entry of this order. If the tenth day falls on a holiday or weekend, then on the next business day. The parties are free to arrange for some other date by mutual agreement.
Sanctions in the amount of $560 are awarded against plaintiffs ZF Micro Solutions and David Feldman, jointly, and in favor of Illinois Union Ins. Co. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: David May; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on WED-OCT-02-2013:
Melissa A. Dubbs, Esq. of Carlson, Calladine & Peterson LLP [415.391.9851] appearing for defendants SUSAN HANDELMAN'S and ROPERS, MAJESKI, KOHN & BENTLEY PC

The Court adopts its tentative ruling which is not contested as follows:
Re Defendants SUSAN HANDELMAN'S and ROPERS, MAJESKI, KOHN & BENTLEY PC'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, Production Of Documents, To Establish Admissions And For Sanctions Against Plaintiffs is GRANTED with respect to Defendants' motion to compel production of documents; within 15 days Plaintiffs David Feldman and ZF Micro Solutions, Inc. shall produce documents responsive to Defendants' requests for production. The remainder of the relief requested is DENIED AS MOOT WITHOUT PREJUDICE to Defendants' ability to move to compel David Feldman and ZF Micro Solutions to provide further responses to Defendants' Special Interrogatories, Set One; Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Requests for Admissions set one. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
